repair_candidate.pr_title: Repair focused maintainer-ready PRs from inventory shard 149
repair_candidate.pr_body:
Cluster: live-pr-inventory-20260617T015524-149

This repair plan keeps contributor branches as the source path where possible and preserves attribution for the original PR authors. It covers only focused, repairable non-security PRs with maintainer_can_modify=true: #54904, #68677, and #69346.

Before merge, hydrate review comments, resolve or explicitly block review-bot findings, refresh mergeability against current main, run latest Codex /review, and rerun the targeted validation listed in this artifact. #64064 is excluded from executable repair because it is broad, failed proof, and needs maintainer judgment first. #68967 is excluded because it is routed to central security handling.
credit_notes: Do not replace or close contributor PRs in this plan-mode job; comments/closes are blocked.
